description_long: This is a tall, slim aluminum can with a dark, nearly black exterior and a matte finish. The front of the can features bold, metallic silver and orange text indicating the product type and flavor, with additional small print below. The back side displays detailed nutritional information and a barcode, all printed in white against the dark background. The top of the can is a standard pull-tab style, slightly recessed, and made of the same metallic material as the body. The can's surface appears smooth and hard, with no visible dents or damage. There are no visible signs of condensation or wetness on the exterior.
description: A tall, slim, dark aluminum can with metallic text and a matte finish, featuring detailed labeling and a standard pull-tab top.
description_view_0: The can is shown from a side angle, with most of the label text obscured and only partial graphics visible.
description_view_1: This view displays the front of the can, clearly showing the product name, flavor, and alcohol content in metallic silver and orange text.
description_view_2: The can is rotated to show a mostly unmarked side, with only faint text and a dark, uninterrupted surface.
description_view_3: The back of the can is visible, featuring nutritional facts, a barcode, and additional product information in white text.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features bold, metallic silver and orange typography on a dark matte background, with clean lines and a modern, minimalistic style. Nutritional and product information is presented in small, white text on the back.
